prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第83名，近年排名稳定在81–85区间，属中上水平211；2026年声誉评价偏负面（ 涉及师德师风相关舆情）；抖音热度总排名第51位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，报考关注度一般偏热；历史投档异常记录中2022年陕西文科曾出现断档，但物理类未见明显 异常；风景园林学A+（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色高度一致，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；林学、林业工程等学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算 机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，热门专业竞争激烈；本省2026年考生总人数约200000，按近年物理类占 比约72%估算物理类考生约143600人，较2025年143368人基本持平，竞争格局稳定；北京林业大学位于北京，对辽宁考生有一定 跨省吸引力；该校在辽宁招生占比约2.5%–3%，属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近三年稳定在17500–17700区间、2026年计划小幅扩招3人（+3.6%）使竞争略有加 剧、热门工科专业持续高热推高报考热度、学校声誉偏负面但影响有限，在2025年基准17653名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约18086名，区间17586–18586名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18648 → 15912 → 17563 → 17554 → 17653. There was a significant forward shift in 2022, but the last three years have been stable in the 17500–17700 range, with a baseline of about 17653 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 76 in 2021, 77 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 82 in 2024, and 83 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 86, an increase of 3 (+3.6%) from 2025, with an expansion rate slightly higher than previous years, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the 81–85 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics and style related public opinion). Douyin popularity ranks 51st overall (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and application attention is generally moderate to hot. In historical admission anomaly records, there was a gap in 2022 for Liberal Arts in Shaanxi, but no obvious anomaly for Physics Category. Landscape Architecture is A+ (top in the country), highly consistent with the university's forestry and agriculture characteristics, strongly attracting applications to related majors. Forestry, Forestry Engineering, and other disciplines have outstanding strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors, leading to intense competition for popular majors. The total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 200,000. Estimating Physics Category examinees at about 143,600 based on the recent proportion of about 72%, roughly flat compared to 143,368 in 2025, indicating a stable competitive landscape. Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Liaoning examinees. The university's enrollment share in Liaoning is about 2.5%–3%, which is moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable historical rankings in the 17500–17700 range over the past three years, a small expansion of 3 places (+3.6%) in 2026 leading to slightly intensified competition, persistently high popularity of hot engineering majors driving up application heat, and a somewhat negative school reputation with limited impact, based on the 2025 baseline of 17653, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 18086, with a range of 17586–18586.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17586–18586, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Mechanical, Mathematics, Statistics, etc.) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information, Landscape Architecture Liangxi Class) as a sprint. Tier 3 majors (Forestry Engineering, Landscape Gardening, Food, etc.) serve as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<17586), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>18586), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net.
